TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-pear_bunuk

S.FORM: a u sa ku ayam tu sananal.
S.TRANSL: 雞在早上啼叫。
The cock made cockcrow in the morning.

S.FORM: malukay a tamdaw sa ata matabal a tayza maluk ya cacay a babalaki ya tatama a babalaki sa.
S.TRANSL: 一位老農夫一早去工作。
An old male farmer went to work early in the morning.

S.FORM: mihiya tu heci nu kilang mazuhem tu sa sa.
S.TRANSL: 果實成熟了。
The fruits were ripe.

S.FORM: kalic a miala tu heci nu kilang mikalic ciniza sa.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上果樹摘果實。
He climbed the fruit tree to pluck the fruits.

S.FORM: yadah ku heci nya kilang niza.
S.TRANSL: 他的樹結很多果實。
His trees bore many fruits.

S.FORM: cacay a cayna sa matumes tu.
S.TRANSL: 已裝滿一個菜籃。
There was a basket of fruits.

S.FORM: mabilil henay ciniza a mi mipecu’ tya heci nya kilang bilil sa sa.
S.TRANSL: 他又趕緊摘果實。
He plucked the fruits in a hurry.

S.FORM: u tamdaw tu tamdaw sananal sa mabilil tu taumah ku taumahay.
S.TRANSL: 去田裡的人趕緊到田裡去。
Farmers went to work in a hurry.

S.FORM: pakan tu ku zuma tu sizi sa ku sizi.
S.TRANSL: 其他的就餵羊去了。
Other people fed goats.

S.FORM: kitinen nu pakanay tu sizi.
S.TRANSL: 餵羊的人牽著羊。
The person who fed goats pulled goats.

S.FORM: makabatikal a tamdaw mabatikal a tayza i katayzaan.
S.TRANSL: 騎腳踏車的人就騎車到他要去的地方。
The cycler rode his bicycle to the place he wanted to go.

S.FORM: iza kya cacay a wawa sa bilil sa ciniza makabatikal matabesiw niza kya ma matukuh niza kya mipecu’ay tu heci nu kilang a babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩專心騎車穿過，然後到達農夫摘果實的地方。
A child rode his bicycle in a hurry, who passed by the farmer and arrived at where he plucked his fruits.

S.FORM: waw matumes kina cayna sa kya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩說：「哇!這菜籃已裝滿了。」
That child said that “Wow! That basket is full.”

S.FORM: padangen aku a miala sa ala han niza ku cacay a cayna nu heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: 他幫忙他拿了一個菜籃的果實。
He helped him carry one basket of fruits.

S.FORM: pakacaw han niza i tiza i batikal niza.
S.TRANSL: 他把菜籃放到腳踏車上。
He put it onto a bicycle.

S.FORM: mabatikal ciniza bilil sa ciniza mabatikal.
S.TRANSL: 他趕緊騎車。
He rode a bicycle in a hurry.

S.FORM: izaw kya tatayna makabatikal i nu ayawan niza.
S.TRANSL: 有一個女的騎腳踏車在他前面。
A girl rode a bicycle in front of him.

S.FORM: wa ci Bedi’ sa kya tatama a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩說：「啊！是Bedi。」
That boy said, “Ah! it is Bedi’.”

S.FORM: kakapah ni Bedi’ sa.
S.TRANSL: 「Bedi’，好好喔！」（有人這麼說。）
Bedi’, it’s good." (Somebody said.)

S.FORM: sikul sa a matabesiw nya kayin kya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩一直回頭當女孩經過時。
That child looked back when the girl passed by.

S.FORM: misikul ciniza cay tu kamelaw niza kya i nu ayawan a baetu.
S.TRANSL: 他回頭看而沒看到前面的石頭。
He looked back and did not see the stone in front of him.

S.FORM: matabi maskung nya batikal nya wawa kya kya baetu mapulin kya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩撞到石頭，然後跌倒。
That child hit a stone and tripped.

S.FORM: mabelun nani i tiza i batikal kya ya cayna ya kanas nitumesan nya babalaki tu heci nya kilang mabelun i tiza i zazan.
S.TRANSL: 那老人裝滿的果實從腳踏車上倒出來倒在路上。
The fruits, which were put in the front of the bicycle, poured out and scattered on the road.

S.FORM: ya kya ci Tuy mapulin mapulin sa kya tatuluay a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩說：「那小孩跌倒了。」
The three children said, “That child tripped!”

S.FORM: na mamelaw nuheni i zazan padang han nya tatuluay a wawa kya.
S.TRANSL: 三個小孩在路上看到那就去幫忙。
The three children saw it on the road and helped him.

S.FORM: ci Tuy a mi lacul i tiza i cayna tya nya heci nu kilang padang han nu a mihiya sa.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩就去幫忙Tuy 把菜籃裝滿果實。
The three children helped Tuy fill the basket with fruits.

S.FORM: matumes tu kya nisapudan nuheni na malaklak kya heci nya kilang sa alay sa kya hiya kukay sa kya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩跟幫忙他撿果實的說謝謝。
The child said thank you to those who helped him pick up the fruits.

S.FORM: mumul tu ciniza.
S.TRANSL: 他就走了。
He left.

S.FORM: ya tatutuay a wawa sa cay pihaymaw sa masasakamu kuheni.
S.TRANSL: 三個小孩說：「他是不小心的。」
Three children said, “he is not on purpose.”

S.FORM: tya mumul tu kya mi si mialaay tya heci nya kilang a wawa sa.
S.TRANSL: 那個拿果實的小孩走了。
The child who took fruits left.

S.FORM: mamelaw nya cacay a wawa kya i ni kina tupel mapawan niza sa.
S.TRANSL: （我們看到）他把帽子忘在這裡。
(we saw) he left his hat here.

S.FORM: hyw ini kina tupel isu han niza kya hiya.
S.TRANSL: 他跟他說你的帽子在這裡。
He told him that your hat was here.

S.FORM: pabelien niza tya tupel.
S.TRANSL: 他把帽子給他。
He gave him his hat.

S.FORM: na mahetik isaw na mapulin i kya tupel sa.
S.TRANSL: 帽子是因為跌倒掉下來的。
The hat dropped when the boy tripped.

S.FORM: pabeli han tu niza tya tupel.
S.TRANSL: 就把帽子給（他）。
He have (him) the hat.

S.FORM: alay tu nipabelian isu tina nisapudan nu misu.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝你給我的。
Thank you for giving me.

S.FORM: anu nayi kamu sa hica han nu maku sa kya ci Tuy.
S.TRANSL: Tuy說如果沒有你的話，我不知道怎如何是好。
Tuy said that I do not know what to do without you.

S.FORM: tya paanin han ni Tuy tya nya i kanasay niza nya i caynaay a heci nya kilang pabeli simacacay kuheni sa.
S.TRANSL: Tuy分給每人一個果實。
Tuy gave each person one fruit.

S.FORM: mumul tu.
S.TRANSL: 離開了。
He left.

S.FORM: mukan kuheni.
S.TRANSL: 他們就吃了。
They ate it.

S.FORM: muculil sa kuheni a matayza i pisalamaan nuheni.
S.TRANSL: 他們走到他們玩的地方。
They went to where they could play.

S.FORM: matabesiw nuheni kya kya hiya kya isaw kya mihiyaay ya mipecuay tya heci nya kilang.
S.TRANSL: 他們經過那裡果農的地方。
They passed by where the farmer was.

S.FORM: ya mipecuay tya heci nya kilang mahamin tu niza tasasa ciniza.
S.TRANSL: 摘完了果實的果農下來了。
The farmer who finished his plucking descended.

S.FORM: melaw han niza kya nayi tu ku cacay a kanas.
S.TRANSL: 他看一籃怎麼不見了。
He saw and one basket disappeared.

S.FORM: i cuwa tu sa.
S.TRANSL: 到哪去了。
Where was it?

S.FORM: mabiyalaw kya mipecuay tu tu hiya cima ku mialaay sa.
S.TRANSL: 農夫很緊張想說是誰拿走了。
The farmer was nervous and wondered who took it away.

S.FORM: wawa niza.
S.TRANSL: 是不是他的小孩。
Would it be his child?

S.FORM: anu cima maliyuh ciniza mi si.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道到底是誰。
He did not know who did this.

S.FORM: misimsim kya babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 那老人一直想。
The old man wondered.

S.FORM: a izaw i lima nuheni kya heci nya kilang sa kya babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 那老人說為何在他們手上有果實。
That old man said that why they had fruits on their hands.

S.FORM: sabahkasa kya babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 那老人嚇一跳。
That old man was shocked.

S.FORM: nayi ku cacay a cayna.
S.TRANSL: 一個菜籃不見了。
One basket disappeared.

S.FORM: tulu kina cima cacay kina tuluay a wawa ca’ay pakacacay a cayna a cayna sa kya simsim nya babalaki tya heci nya kilang niza.
S.TRANSL: 那老人這樣想就算那三小孩一人一個也不到一個菜籃。
That old people thought that even though each child had one fruit, it was less than one basket.

S.FORM: mabiyalaw kya babalaki tacuwa tu.
S.TRANSL: 那老人家很緊張到哪裡去了。
The old man was nervous where the basket was.

S.FORM: mabeyalaw kya babalaki tu cinizaan tu.
S.TRANSL: 老人自己很緊張。
The old man himself was very nervous.
